description: Happy path: schedule a thrift flip video on a weekly cadence with existing slots to avoid

input.working_title: Dark Moody Thrift Flip: Turning a $12 Dresser Into a Statement Piece

expect.working_title: Dark Moody Thrift Flip: Turning a $12 Dresser Into a Statement Piece
expect.recommended_publish_date: YYYY-MM-DD format, not conflicting with existing_slots
expect.short_form_drop_dates: array of 3 to 5 objects each with drop_number, date, platform_priority, timing_note
expect.rationale: non-empty string referencing cadence and conflict avoidances
expect.conflicts_avoided: array containing dates from existing_slots that were skipped

prohibit: short_form_drop_dates has fewer than 3 or more than 5 entries
rationale contains fabricated engagement data or historical performance claims

description: Minimal input: no existing_slots provided, biweekly cadence

input.working_title: Vintage Mirror Gallery Wall on a Budget

expect.working_title: Vintage Mirror Gallery Wall on a Budget
expect.recommended_publish_date: YYYY-MM-DD format within the week of November 3

prohibit: conflicts_avoided contains dates when no existing_slots were provided
cadence logic references weekly spacing when input specifies biweekly

description: Edge case: all reasonable dates within the window are taken by existing_slots

input.working_title: Cozy Fall Mantel Styling with Thrifted Finds

expect.working_title: Cozy Fall Mantel Styling with Thrifted Finds
expect.rationale: non-empty string acknowledging the tight window and heavy conflict avoidance

prohibit: recommended_publish_date falls on a date in existing_slots
rationale omits mention of the constrained scheduling window
